meanings.definition: make false by mutilation or addition; as of a message or story
twist and press out of shape
affect as in thought or feeling
examples: My personal feelings color my judgment in this case

meanings.definition: alter the shape of (something) by stress
examples: His body was deformed by leprosy

meanings.definition: so badly formed or out of shape as to be ugly
examples: a limp caused by a malformed foot

meanings.definition: having an intended meaning altered or misrepresented
examples: many of the facts seemed twisted out of any semblance to reality
a perverted translation of the poem
